name: Excessive Firewall Denies from Remote Host
notes: Reports excessive attempts from a remote host, across multiple hosts, to access the firewall and access is denied. More than 40 attempts are detected across at least 40 destination IP addresses in 5 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 40 times
conditions_text: when the domain is one of the following Array
when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 40 times, across more than 40 destination IP within 5 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 40 times, across more than 40 destination IP within 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Excessive Firewall Denies from Remote Host on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the domain is one of the following Array
AND when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Firewall or ACL Denies with the same source IP more than 40 times, across more than 40 destination IP within 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Excessive Firewall Denies Across Multiple Hosts From A Remote Host

Event description: Detected excessive attempts from a remote host, across multiple hosts, to access the firewall and access is denied. More than 40 attempts are detected across at least 40 destination IP addresses in 5 minutes.
